dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What is that!? The mansion is shaking...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Is this where the lab is!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6

dialogue.speaker: Sanji

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
